name: Anise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the lard and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs and aniseed.
3. Stir together the flour and salt; stir into the creamed mixture.
4. Wrap the dough in waxed paper and chill for several hours.
5. Using a slightly rounded teaspoonful of dough, roll with hands on a lightly floured surface to form a 4 x 1/4-inch rope.
6. Place on an ungreased baking sheet, crossing the ends to form a handwritten "l." (Alternatively, shape the dough into two rolls that are 8 inches long and 1 1/2 inches in diameter; chill.)
7. Slice the dough into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
8. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 375°F until the edges are golden, for 10 to 12 minutes.
10. Cool on racks.
